explanations.5: This section defines data that will be shared with template partials (reusable chunks of content) when rendering the page.
explanations.13: This is a hint to spell-checkers to ignore the word 'phplint' so it doesn't flag it as a misspelling.
explanations.21: This pulls in a reusable template file from a parent directory to avoid repeating the same content on every similar page.
